title: Spanish Perilla Paella
description: A traditional Spanish paella recipe with the addition of perilla leaves for a unique twist. Perfect for a summer dinner party.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the packed perilla leaves and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Add the Spanish rice and cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
Add the dense tomatoes, leafy artichoke hearts, and smoked paprika. Stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pan and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional perilla leaves if desired.
